enrichmentSources.name: Artificial Analysis
enrichmentSources.notes: Manual seed data for model intelligence, agentic, speed, and selected benchmark price metrics until a stable machine-readable source is integrated.

enrichmentSources.name: OpenRouter
enrichmentSources.notes: Automatic pricing enrichment source from OpenRouter model listings. When ORPT-Bench shows a reference price for a free model, it is explicitly labeled as a paid sibling or nearby family reference derived with a 3:1 input:output blend from OpenRouter prompt/output prices.

benchmark.pricingNotes: OpenRouter reference blend for google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview is 4.5 USD per 1M tokens using a 3:1 input:output mix.
OpenRouter reference blend for google/gemini-3-flash-preview is 1.125 USD per 1M tokens using a 3:1 input:output mix.

stability.notes: Observed to loop and hit the benchmark process deadline on the task-05 scripting smoke run, so it should not be in the default headless dev matrix.

knownLimitations: Loops and hits the benchmark process deadline on the task-05 scripting smoke run.

benchmark.pricingNotes: OpenRouter reference blend for nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free is 0 USD per 1M tokens using a 3:1 input:output mix. Reference price uses nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b at 0.2 USD per 1M tokens from the same OpenRouter family.

stability.notes: Observed to take a slow, tool-heavy path on the scripting smoke task.

knownLimitations: Takes a slow, tool-heavy path on the scripting smoke task.
